answers.description: An AI-powered Android agent that autonomously controls your phone through natural language and voice commands.
answers.problem_statement: Users must manually navigate complex app UIs to complete simple tasks — Neuron automates this with AI. There's no easy way to control your entire Android phone hands-free through natural language.
answers.target_users: Both — end users for daily tasks (hands-free AI-driven phone control), developers for extending via SDK/MCP
key_goals: Ship a working MVP in 3 weeks
Achieve >70% task success rate on 10-app benchmark
Zero cloud leaks of sensitive data
answers.deployment: Android APK sideload (Day 1), Play Store later, server via Docker self-hosted
